class.name: PlayFabPartyPeer
class.brief_description: Godot multiplayer peer for a PlayFab Party network.
class.description: Assigned to [code]multiplayer.multiplayer_peer[/code] for RPC and gameplay traffic. Hosts use Godot peer id [code]1[/code] and clients receive positive ids through the addon's transport handshake. Reserved handshake/control packets are filtered out of the public packet queue. Text chat, transcription, mute, and permissions are not part of the transport peer. They live on the meshed chat surface reached as [code]PlayFab.party.chat[/code] (see [PlayFabPartyChat]) and are addressed by PlayFab entity keys.

method.name: get_local_user
method.description: Returns the local [PlayFabUser] for this peer.

method.name: get_descriptor
method.description: Returns the finalized base64 network descriptor, or an empty string while the descriptor is still pending.

method.name: get_peer_entity_key
method.description: Returns the PlayFab entity key dictionary for [param peer_id].

method.name: get_peers
method.description: Returns the list of known peer ids.

method.name: close_with_reason
method.description: Closes internal routing and network resources, emitting Godot-consistent connection state transitions.

signal.name: connection_state_changed
signal.description: Emitted when the peer's [enum MultiplayerPeer.ConnectionStatus] changes.

signal.name: network_error
signal.description: Emitted when a Party transport error occurs.
